system_prompt: Generate consistent sprite sheet animations for 2D game characters. Maintain identical character design, proportions, and style across all frames.
user_prompt_template:
Create a sprite sheet animation showing a {species} performing this action: {action_description}

Character details:
- Appearance: {appearance}
- Personality: {personality}
- Special ability: {special_ability}

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:

1. CONSISTENCY:
   - Maintain EXACT same character design in every frame
   - Keep proportions, colors, and features identical across frames
   - Same art style and level of detail throughout
   - Character size must be identical in all frames

2. FULL BODY VISIBILITY:
   - Show the COMPLETE character body (head to feet/tail)
   - DO NOT crop or cut off any body parts
   - DO NOT show only the head or upper body
   - Include all limbs, ears, tail, and features
   - Leave enough space around the character

3. LOOPABLE ANIMATION:
   - First frame and last frame must connect seamlessly
   - Animation should cycle smoothly when played on repeat
   - Plan the motion so it returns to starting position
   - 4-6 frames total in horizontal row

4. TECHNICAL SPECS:
   - Pixel art or simple 2D game sprite style
   - Clean white or transparent background
   - Character centered in each frame
   - Equal spacing between frames
   - Motion reflects {personality} personality

Generate the complete sprite sheet as a single image with all frames side by side.
notes: This prompt is used for generating sprite animations via image generation APIs like Gemini Flash Image. Emphasizes consistency, full body visibility, and loopable cycles.
